# Copilot instructions for ink-board

ink-board is a tri-color ePaper display system: an ESP8266-based firmware that serves a BMP upload API, and a Node.js dashboard renderer that generates and pushes images to it.

## Module instructions

- **firmware/** — ESP8266 firmware (PlatformIO / Arduino): see [`firmware,instructions.md`](./firmware.instructions.md)
- **dashboard/** — Node.js dashboard renderer: see [`dashboard.instructions.md`](./dashboard.instructions.md)
